mapper.select: SELECT a.post_id, a.inst_id, a.post_code, a.name, a.remarks, a.system_code, a.create_user, a.update_user, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.is_deleted FROM sys_post a LEFT JOIN sys_post_user b ON a.post_id = b.post_id and b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_deleted = 0
